warnings: Dropped 2 non-scored row(s) worth 0 points (Penalty Points (Dress Code), Penalty Points (Late Arrival)). Check they really aren't scored.
_review.note: Machine-parsed from the official rating sheet. plan.md F3: nobody may be graded against this until a human confirms it.
_review.paraphrase_note: Descriptions and level descriptors are restated in our own words (plan.md §20). Criterion names and every point value are exactly as published on the official rating sheet.

criteria.name: Demonstrates understanding of the role play and defines problem(s) to be solved

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The role play scenario was not explained, and no issues were identified.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Either the role play scenario was explained, or the issues were defined, but not both.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Both the role play scenario was explained and the issues were defined.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: A thorough understanding of the role play scenario and a clear definition of the issues were evident.

criteria.name: Identifies alternatives and the pro(s) and con(s) of each

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No different options were presented.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One or more options were offered, but their advantages or disadvantages were not examined.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: A minimum of two options were presented, with an analysis of their benefits and drawbacks.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Several different options were provided, and a comprehensive analysis of their advantages and disadvantages was conducted for each.

criteria.name: Identifies logical solution and aspects of implementation

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No resolution was proposed.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: A resolution was offered, but a strategy for putting it into practice was missing.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: A reasonable resolution was presented along with a developed strategy for its execution.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: A practical resolution and a detailed execution strategy were developed, including the identification of required resources.

criteria.name: Demonstrates knowledge and understanding of the event knowledge areas:
criteria.description: This evaluates the participant's grasp of various subject areas, including strategic planning, hospitality marketing, market analysis, operations, customer service, human resources, hotel sales, project management, financial resources, meeting design, site selection, general marketing, communication, professionalism, legal considerations, financial management, budgeting, current industry trends, environmental, ethical, and global concerns, staff training and management, program design, stakeholder relations, engaging speakers and performers, food and beverage sales, and managing attendee movement.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No understanding of the specified subject areas was shown.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Understanding was demonstrated in one or two of the specified subject areas.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Understanding was demonstrated in three of the specified subject areas.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Understanding was demonstrated in four or more of the specified subject areas.

criteria.name: Statements are well-organized and clearly stated

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The participant(s) did not appear ready to present.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant(s) were prepared, but the presentation lacked a coherent flow.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation followed a logical progression.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation flowed logically, and all points were clearly articulated.

criteria.name: Consistently displays confidence, poised body language, engaging eye contact, and effective voice projection.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: None of the expected presentation skills were displayed.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One or two of the expected presentation skills (self-assurance, composed posture, direct eye contact, or clear speaking volume) were displayed.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Three of the expected presentation skills (self-assurance, composed posture, direct eye contact, or clear speaking volume) were displayed.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: All expected presentation skills were displayed, which enhanced the overall delivery.

criteria.name: Demonstrates the ability to effectively answer questions

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The participant was unable to respond to inquiries.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Responses to inquiries were incomplete.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Responses to inquiries were thorough.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant engaged with the judges while providing comprehensive answers to all inquiries.
